chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1333 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5633/2023 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 29.11.2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this petition as according to him the DDO powers have already been conferred upon the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
